DescribeBlbs.address: Internal IP address of the LoadBalancer to query, in dotted-decimal format
DescribeBlbs.name: Name of the LoadBalancer to query
DescribeBlbs.blbId: ID of the LoadBalancer to query (exact match only)
DescribeBlbs.bccId: LoadBalancer bound to the specified BCC instance (exact match only)
DescribeBlbs.exactlyMatch: Set to true for exact match; otherwise fuzzy match. Default is false
DescribeBlbs.marker: Starting position for paginated queries, a system-generated string
DescribeBlbs.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, up to 1000. Default is 1000
DescribeBlbs.type: Type of LoadBalancer instance; defaults to standard type if omitted; pass "ipv6" to query IPv6 BLB instances
